name: San Francisco Black Bean & Corn Stew
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Dry sherry or apple juice
2 cups Corn kernels, fresh or frozen
4 tsp Chili powder or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large stock pot over medium-high heat, combine the sherry and olive oil.
2. When hot, add onions. Stir and sauté until soft but not brown.
3. Add celery, carrot, and bell pepper; stir and sauté for an additional 5 minutes.
4. Add remaining ingredients; bring to a boil.
5. Lower heat and simmer for 15 minutes.
6. Before serving, puree 1 cup of the stew in a blender.
7. Return the purée to the pot.
Variation: Serve with crushed corn chips on top.
